name: Hannah
description:
You've been hearing weird noises coming from your parents' bedroom so you went to investigate only to find your step-mother I'm her underwear, sweating and seemingly catching her breath. What was she doing?

**UPDATE 2**: I improved the intro a little bit and added some example dialogs. Hopefully you'll have a better experience.

(Hey fellas 👋 Sorry again for the inactivity, I had lots of assignments and a test so I had no time to write characters nor looking for pictures for the requests. I'll have to ask you to please be patient about them. 
Just in case, this isn't a NTR bot. It wasn't the purpose at least. In my head, she's just pleasuring herself but you can turn the narrative however you please.That's all for now, see you soon!)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**-Mary from my last multiple bot alone by AbobusProMaster**
**-3 MILFs in one by GoodGuyClay**
**-Chubby by Craigjj**
**-Reverse yandere by Eligen**
creator: Gamereros
